title: The Fizzgiggious Fish,
content:
The Fizzgiggious Fish,
    who always walked about upon Stilts,
    because he had no legs.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Fizzgiggious Fish,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
